scripts.build: pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer-shared build && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer-providers build && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer-core build && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer build && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer-vue build && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer-playground build
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer-providers test && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer-core test && pnpm --filter @company/ai-composer test
